fields.Name: HubSpot
fields.Description: HubSpot is an AI-powered customer platform that unifies marketing, sales, customer service, content, operations, and commerce on a single CRM foundation, helping businesses attract, engage, and retain customers.

Models.Name: OAuth2AuthCode
Models.Description: Marketplace / public-app OAuth 2.0 authorization-code grant with refresh tokens. Access token TTL ~30 minutes; refresh token long-lived.

Models.Name: PrivateAppAccessToken
Models.Description: In-account integration: long-lived static bearer token minted from a Private App. No refresh required.

Tiers.Notes: Per-app rate limit applied across the OAuth-installed account.
Search endpoint family has a separate stricter limit; treated as a per-endpoint policy.

RateLimits.Strategy: Treat 429 as exponential-backoff using X-HubSpot-RateLimit-* headers as the primary signal (vendor does NOT document a Retry-After header).

Webhooks.SignatureScheme: Base64-encoded HMAC-SHA256 over (HTTP method + request URI + request body + X-HubSpot-Request-Timestamp).

Bulk.Notes: HubSpot bulk is synchronous batch endpoints (not job-based).

Idempotency.Notes: HubSpot does NOT document an idempotency-key header. CRUD callers rely on natural keys (email for contacts) + batch upsert semantics.

IncrementalSync.Mechanism: Use the per-object Search API: POST /crm/v3/objects/{type}/search with filterGroups[].filters[].propertyName=hs_lastmodifieddate (contacts use lastmodifieddate), operator=GTE, value=<watermark>; sort by hs_lastmodifieddate ASC.

ProductTaxonomy.BreezeAICoverage: TIER-3 ONLY — no developer-facing API published as of 2026-05-19; excluded from IO/IOF extraction scope.
